subject: civic
learning_objectives: Explain skills that promote interpersonal relationships
Discuss the importance of interpersonal relationships in society

sections.heading: Meaning of Interpersonal Relationship
sections.content: Interpersonal relationship is the interaction or association between two or more people in society. Human beings cannot live in isolation, so interpersonal relationships are essential for peaceful coexistence.

sections.heading: Types of Interpersonal Relationship
sections.content: Types of interpersonal relationship include man and woman relationship, man and man relationship, woman and woman relationship, government and individual relationship, peer relationship, and relationship across culture or race.

sections.heading: Skills That Promote Interpersonal Relationship
sections.content: Skills that promote interpersonal relationship include honesty, tolerance, love, patience, selflessness, hospitality, truthfulness, and forgiveness.

sections.heading: Importance of Interpersonal Relationship
sections.content: Interpersonal relationship promotes peace, unity, progress, development, law and order, security, and a good image for individuals and communities.
